ASSIGNED TO DEPT 318 BY THE DEPARTMENT OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER COURT TRIAL. PARTIES SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED/ADMITTED. PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO POSSESSION OF THE BEDROOM (FACING SOUTH, BEDROOM ON THE LEFT) LOCATED AT 1212 PACIFIC AVE., APT. 1, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. PLAINTIFF WAIVES PAST DUE RENT AND DAMAGES. DEFENDANT SHALL VACATE THE PREMISES NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 30, 2009. REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON SEP-21-2009 IN DEPT. 318. JUDGE DONALD J. SULLIVAN, CLERK: V. MACK, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR 5976
